name: teacher-welcome-ext
description: Getting Started walkthrough for Teacher IDE with guided steps for new users

walkthroughs.title: Getting Started with Teacher
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to use Teacher IDE to accelerate your coding journey with AI-powered tutoring, lessons, and progress tracking.

steps.title: Welcome to Teacher IDE
steps.description:
Teacher IDE is your personal coding classroom. It combines a full-featured code editor with AI tutoring, structured curriculum, and real-time assessments.

[Open Teacher Dashboard](command:teacher.openDashboard)

media.markdown: Welcome to Teacher IDE — where learning to code meets intelligent guidance.

steps.title: Meet Your Tutor
steps.description:
Your AI tutor adapts to your skill level and learning style. Ask questions, get hints, or request explanations — all without leaving the editor.

[Start a Tutor Session](command:teacher.startTutor)

media.markdown: The AI tutor is always available in the sidebar to help you understand concepts and debug your code.

steps.title: Your First Lesson
steps.description:
Lessons are structured coding exercises that teach concepts step by step. Start with the basics and work your way up.

[Browse Lessons](command:teacher.browseLessons)

media.markdown: Each lesson includes objectives, guided instructions, and practice exercises.

steps.title: Check Your Work
steps.description:
Assessments verify your understanding with automated tests and AI-powered code review. Get instant feedback on your solutions.

[Run Assessment](command:teacher.runAssessment)

media.markdown: Assessments give you immediate, actionable feedback so you can improve continuously.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.description:
View your learning progress, completed lessons, assessment scores, and skill growth over time.

[View Progress](command:teacher.viewProgress)

media.markdown: Your progress dashboard shows completed topics, time spent, and areas for improvement.
